title: Vacancy for Category Manager at DTDC Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at DTDC Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the DTDC Global Group family as a Category Manager in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DTDC Global Group:
DTDC Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
